text: Welcome, mentor_lina — you’re approved as mentor. Thanks for joining. Please read the mentoring guide and introduce yourself in the mentor space when you’re ready.
Welcome, guide_sam — you’re approved as event_helper. Glad to have you onboard. Please check the event playbook and coordinate in the helper channels before jumping in.
Welcome, helper_alex — you’re approved as moderator. Please review the moderation guidelines, start slow, and flag anything uncertain to the senior mod team.
